Tested module import and parameter functionality successfully

review_notes: EXPERIMENTAL FEATURE: This implementation significantly changes training dynamics
BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY: Default behavior (False) preserves exact current functionality
GRADIENT ISOLATION: When True, second-order gradients through optimization are eliminated
RESEARCH PURPOSE: Intended for diagnostic comparison studies, not production use
PERFORMANCE IMPACT: May reduce model quality by preventing gradient flow through optimization
DOCUMENTATION: Comprehensive warnings added about experimental nature and risks
TESTING: Basic functionality verified - parameter assignment and module import work correctly
warnings: This is an EXPERIMENTAL feature for research/diagnostic purposes only
Enabling use_detached_opt_step=True may significantly reduce model quality
The detached mode prevents learning of effective optimization strategies
Should be used only for comparison studies to understand gradient flow impact
Comprehensive testing required before any production consideration
